title: Minecraft But Dirt can be crafted into OP Items!
description: This is a Minecraft Java Edition Datapack in which you can craft dirt into op items.
body:
This is Minecraft Java Edition Data Pack in which you can craft dirt into op items, like 1 dirt into 1 diamonds, two dirts into totem of undying, three dirts into elytra, four dirts into a mace and much more.
More crafting recipies with dirt coming soon!
